observations: Playwright browser verification on PORT=5170 with OSS runtime (CAUSEFLOW_RUNTIME=oss).
/dashboard returns 200; sidebar shows QA Tenant AC035, AC035 checkout latency spike, and New investigation.
Clicking the incident opens detail view with Evidence, Hypotheses, Chat Panel, and Remediation chrome.
Root cause: bootstrap.ts line 508 wires DynamoHypothesisRepository unconditionally; OSS runtime has no DynamoDB.
defects: expected the dashboard incident detail hypotheses panel to load without an internal server error; observed hypotheses request failed with INTERNAL_ERROR because OSS bootstrap still wires DynamoHypothesisRepository (DynamoDB unavailable in CAUSEFLOW_RUNTIME=oss); evidence GET /v1/investigation/f5276dde-9b84-48b2-b888-bb080498924e/hypotheses status=500
